violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by equipment. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (second floor ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. CA - Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
